ddls:
CREATE TABLE "animals" (
  "animal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each animal species */,
  "animal_name" TEXT /* Name of the animal species */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of animal */,
  "domestic" INTEGER /* Binary indicator for whether the animal is domestic (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "catsize" INTEGER /* Binary indicator for whether the animal is of cat size (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the animal species */,
  "scientific_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the animal species */,
  "kingdom" TEXT /* Kingdom of the animal species */,
  "phylum" TEXT /* Phylum of the animal species */,
  "class" TEXT /* Class of the animal species */,
  "order" TEXT /* Order of the animal species */,
  "family" TEXT /* Family of the animal species */,
  "genus" TEXT /* Genus of the animal species */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species of the animal species */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("animal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_animals_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES animal_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "animal_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of animal */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type of animal */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the type of animal */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "physical_characteristics" (
  "char_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of physical characteristics */,
  "animal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the animal species */,
  "hair" INTEGER /* Binary indicator for the presence of hair (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "feathers" INTEGER /* Binary indicator for the presence of feathers (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "eggs" INTEGER /* Binary indicator for the production of eggs (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "milk" INTEGER /* Binary indicator for the production of milk (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "airborne" INTEGER /* Binary indicator for the ability to fly (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "aquatic" INTEGER /* Binary indicator for the ability to live in water (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "predator" INTEGER /* Binary indicator for predatory behavior (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "toothed" INTEGER /* Binary indicator for the presence of teeth (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "backbone" INTEGER /* Binary indicator for the presence of a backbone (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "breathes" INTEGER /* Binary indicator for the ability to breathe (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "venomous" INTEGER /* Binary indicator for the presence of venom (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "fins" INTEGER /* Binary indicator for the presence of fins (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "legs" INTEGER /* Number of legs */,
  "tail" INTEGER /* Binary indicator for the presence of a tail (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "average_weight" REAL /* Average weight of the animal in kg */,
  "average_length" REAL /* Average length of the animal in cm */,
  "average_lifespan" REAL /* Average lifespan of the animal in years */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("char_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_physical_characteristics_animal_id FOREIGN KEY ("animal_id") REFERENCES animals ("animal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "habitats" (
  "habitat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each habitat */,
  "habitat_name" TEXT /* Name of the habitat */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the habitat */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("habitat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "animal_habitats" (
  "animal_habitat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each animal-habitat relationship */,
  "animal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the animal species */,
  "habitat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the habitat */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("animal_habitat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_animal_habitats_habitat_id FOREIGN KEY ("habitat_id") REFERENCES habitats ("habitat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_animal_habitats_animal_id FOREIGN KEY ("animal_id") REFERENCES animals ("animal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "behaviors" (
  "behavior_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each behavior */,
  "behavior_name" TEXT /* Name of the behavior */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the behavior */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("behavior_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "animal_behaviors" (
  "animal_behavior_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each animal-behavior relationship */,
  "animal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the animal species */,
  "behavior_id" INTEGER /* ID of the behavior */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("animal_behavior_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_animal_behaviors_behavior_id FOREIGN KEY ("behavior_id") REFERENCES behaviors ("behavior_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_animal_behaviors_animal_id FOREIGN KEY ("animal_id") REFERENCES animals ("animal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conservation_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conservation status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the conservation status */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the conservation status */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "animal_conservation" (
  "animal_conservation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each animal-conservation status relationship */,
  "animal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the animal species */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the conservation status */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("animal_conservation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_animal_conservation_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES conservation_status ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_animal_conservation_animal_id FOREIGN KEY ("animal_id") REFERENCES animals ("animal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "animal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the animal species */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_animal_id FOREIGN KEY ("animal_id") REFERENCES animals ("animal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "references" (
  "reference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reference */,
  "animal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the animal species */,
  "reference_url" TEXT /* URL of the reference */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_references_animal_id FOREIGN KEY ("animal_id") REFERENCES animals ("animal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "animal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the animal species being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the animal data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the animal data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_animal_id FOREIGN KEY ("animal_id") REFERENCES animals ("animal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "animal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the animal species */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version changes */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_animal_id FOREIGN KEY ("animal_id") REFERENCES animals ("animal_id")
)
